LanguageData.CRL_Settings_CaptureStackTraces: Capture stack traces for every entry
LanguageData.CRL_Settings_GitHubToken_Note: Stored in plain text in this mod's settings. Only needs the 'gist' scope. When set, uploaded bundles are created under your GitHub account.
LanguageData.CRL_Settings_UploadNoBuffer: No in-memory log buffer is active, so there is nothing to upload.
